programme.title: Booked: First Day In:2
programme.sub-title: Should Have Gotten Arrested In The 90s
programme.desc: A man in Virginia Beach parties a little too hard at a parade and suffers a medical emergency when he ends up in jail. Meanwhile, a stand-up comedian learns the hard way that not everyone can take a joke.

programme.title: Evil Up Close:6 E9 -Kids Who Kill
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Aaron Campbell didn't admit his crimes until after his conviction. He abducted six-year-old neighbour Alesha MacPhailand, carried her to a nearby wood, and raped and murdered her.

programme.title: After The First 48:16
programme.desc: When a beloved son and brother is murdered just feet from his home, his family has one question: Why? It's up to a determined team of Gwinnett County investigators to get their defiant suspect to talk.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent?:5
programme.desc: When a mother learns her daughter has been abused by the teenager's estranged father, the police are called. But, before the investigation can gather speed, the father visits unexpectedly.

programme.title: The First 48:25
programme.desc: In Tulsa, Det. White needs a former student to tell the truth about a shooting at an apartment complex. In Gwinnett, a man is shot in front of his friend as a robbery takes a deadly turn.

programme.title: Court Cam:6
programme.desc: A man accused of indecency with a child's doll faces his accuser in court; an arsonist who killed nine people hears it from the judge; a multi-murder suspect misbehaves in the courtroom; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam:6
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. An accused murderer attacks a courtroom deputy; a 9-year-old boy confronts his father's killer; and more.

programme.title: After The First 48:15
programme.desc: In Tulsa, a party becomes the scene of a murder. For investigators and prosecutors, the case is riding on two accomplices betraying their friends, despite the risks.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans:1
programme.desc: Det. Walter Edmond responds to a homicide where a woman is found dead from multiple gunshot wounds, and a couple at the scene leads him to a suspect.

programme.title: Taking The Stand:2
programme.desc: Stay-at-home mom Danielle Redlick was arrested and charged with 2nd Degree Murder and Tampering with Physical Evidence in the death of her husband, pro sports executive Michael Redlick.

programme.title: Murder In The 21st
programme.desc: A horrific quadruple homicide goes unsolved for over a decade. While one investigation goes cold, another heats up as the search holds the key to unravelling the secrets of a serial killer.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape
programme.desc: One FBI undercover agent meets with suspects in Denmark in an effort to retrieve one of the world's lost treasures; another agent takes on an unlikely suspect believed to be planning a murder for hire.

programme.title: City Confidential:8
programme.desc: When a young woman's body is pulled from the ocean off the Big Island, accusations threaten to destroy the local community. As tensions grow, a surprising discovery leads detectives to a devastating truth.

programme.title: Asia's Underworld:1
programme.desc: Take a peep into prostitution in Hong Kong, where it is legal, and Mongolia, where there is an estimated one prostitute for every 160 people.

programme.title: Asia's Underworld:1
programme.desc: Illegal dealers, helpless victims, and authorities reveal the lucrative business of selling people in Cambodia, Thailand and Malaysia.

programme.title: Murder At The Motel
programme.desc: The Sheriff's Office in DeRidder, Louisiana, receives a distressing phone call from the owner of Dee's Motel. The man tells them that he's found a woman dead in room 6.

programme.title: Sleeping With A Killer:2
programme.desc: When a young mother and her two children vanish after a violent argument fuelled by jealousy, a Florida community fears they may have crossed paths with a killer closer to home.

programme.title: Witness To Murder: Digital Evidence
programme.desc: After a young woman is found dead in her bathtub, the investigation focuses in on her estranged husband and her boyfriend. An unexpected digital clue has one of them confessing to the murder.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans:1
programme.desc: Detective Rayell Johnson investigates the murder of a 42-year-old New Orleans native, who was gunned down in his truck on a stormy night.

programme.title: Murder At The Motel
programme.desc: The Sheriff's Office in DeRidder, Louisiana, receives a distressing phone call from the owner of Dee's Motel. The man tells them that he's found a woman dead in room 6.

programme.title: Sleeping With A Killer:2
programme.desc: When a young mother and her two children vanish after a violent argument fuelled by jealousy, a Florida community fears they may have crossed paths with a killer closer to home.

programme.title: Witness To Murder: Digital Evidence
programme.desc: After a young woman is found dead in her bathtub, the investigation focuses in on her estranged husband and her boyfriend. An unexpected digital clue has one of them confessing to the murder.

programme.title: Taking The Stand:2
programme.desc: Stay-at-home mom Danielle Redlick was arrested and charged with 2nd Degree Murder and Tampering with Physical Evidence in the death of her husband, pro sports executive Michael Redlick.

programme.title: Murder In The 21st
programme.desc: A horrific quadruple homicide goes unsolved for over a decade. While one investigation goes cold, another heats up as the search holds the key to unravelling the secrets of a serial killer.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape
programme.desc: One FBI undercover agent meets with suspects in Denmark in an effort to retrieve one of the world's lost treasures; another agent takes on an unlikely suspect believed to be planning a murder for hire.

programme.title: City Confidential:8
programme.desc: When a young woman's body is pulled from the ocean off the Big Island, accusations threaten to destroy the local community. As tensions grow, a surprising discovery leads detectives to a devastating truth.

programme.title: Asia's Underworld:1
programme.desc: Take a peep into prostitution in Hong Kong, where it is legal, and Mongolia, where there is an estimated one prostitute for every 160 people.

programme.title: Asia's Underworld:1
programme.desc: Illegal dealers, helpless victims, and authorities reveal the lucrative business of selling people in Cambodia, Thailand and Malaysia.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans:1
programme.desc: Detective Rayell Johnson investigates the murder of a 42-year-old New Orleans native, who was gunned down in his truck on a stormy night.

programme.title: Taking The Stand:2
programme.desc: Stay-at-home mom Danielle Redlick was arrested and charged with 2nd Degree Murder and Tampering with Physical Evidence in the death of her husband, pro sports executive Michael Redlick.

programme.title: Murder In The 21st
programme.desc: A horrific quadruple homicide goes unsolved for over a decade. While one investigation goes cold, another heats up as the search holds the key to unravelling the secrets of a serial killer.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape
programme.desc: One FBI undercover agent meets with suspects in Denmark in an effort to retrieve one of the world's lost treasures; another agent takes on an unlikely suspect believed to be planning a murder for hire.

programme.title: Murder At The Motel
programme.desc: The Sheriff's Office in DeRidder, Louisiana, receives a distressing phone call from the owner of Dee's Motel. The man tells them that he's found a woman dead in room 6.

programme.title: Sleeping With A Killer:2
programme.desc: When a young mother and her two children vanish after a violent argument fuelled by jealousy, a Florida community fears they may have crossed paths with a killer closer to home.

programme.title: Witness To Murder: Digital Evidence
programme.desc: After a young woman is found dead in her bathtub, the investigation focuses in on her estranged husband and her boyfriend. An unexpected digital clue has one of them confessing to the murder.

programme.title: City Confidential:8
programme.desc: When a young woman's body is pulled from the ocean off the Big Island, accusations threaten to destroy the local community. As tensions grow, a surprising discovery leads detectives to a devastating truth.

programme.title: Asia's Underworld:1
programme.desc: Take a peep into prostitution in Hong Kong, where it is legal, and Mongolia, where there is an estimated one prostitute for every 160 people.

programme.title: Asia's Underworld:1
programme.desc: Illegal dealers, helpless victims, and authorities reveal the lucrative business of selling people in Cambodia, Thailand and Malaysia.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans:1
programme.desc: Detective Rayell Johnson investigates the murder of a 42-year-old New Orleans native, who was gunned down in his truck on a stormy night.

programme.title: The First 48:26
programme.desc: In Mobile, a brazen gunman shoots another man in front of gas station security cameras, and in Gwinnett County, detectives race to identify a woman shot on the side of the road and track down her killer.

programme.title: Lie Detector: Truth Or Deception
programme.desc: Chris Turner sits for a high-stakes polygraph test in the hopes of ending suspicions surrounding the infamous 1984 murder of Catherine Fuller.

programme.title: Women On Death Row
programme.desc: Kerry Lyn Dalton was sentenced to death for the torture and murder of Irene 'Melanie' May. And because Melanie was a meth addict with no fixed address, police did little to investigate her disappearance.

programme.title: Beyond The Headlines: The Series
programme.desc: Chilling accounts of children in danger and the people who fought to protect them. Stories of children who experienced the unthinkable: six girls hunted and murdered in their neighbourhoods; and more.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Dead West
programme.desc: When a mystery woman's burning body is found in an oil field in 2006, the rural community of Kilgore and a determined Texas lawman show why you don't mess with the Lone Star State.

programme.title: Hoarders:15
programme.desc: Local code enforcement has warned John repeatedly about property violations. With the Hoarders team’s help, he must finally clean up or face enforcement action that could cost him everything.

programme.title: Taking The Stand:3
programme.desc: During a road rage incident, Theodore Edgecomb shoots and kills immigration lawyer Jason Cleereman. Charging him with 1st-degree intentional homicide, the state contends it was a cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It?
programme.desc: An off-duty police officer shoots a man in the chest after a social event explodes into a deadly argument between the two men.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent?:4
programme.desc: A traveling nurse is pulled over for a traffic violation in New Mexico and is arrested for felony burglary carried out in her home state of Ohio. Is she a thug for hire or innocent with a rock-solid alibi.

programme.title: Hoarders:15
programme.desc: Local code enforcement has warned John repeatedly about property violations. With the Hoarders team’s help, he must finally clean up or face enforcement action that could cost him everything.

programme.title: Taking The Stand:3
programme.desc: During a road rage incident, Theodore Edgecomb shoots and kills immigration lawyer Jason Cleereman. Charging him with 1st-degree intentional homicide, the state contends it was a cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It?
programme.desc: An off-duty police officer shoots a man in the chest after a social event explodes into a deadly argument between the two men.

programme.title: The First 48:26
programme.desc: In Mobile, a brazen gunman shoots another man in front of gas station security cameras, and in Gwinnett County, detectives race to identify a woman shot on the side of the road and track down her killer.
